verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Deeper, deeper, In the love of Jesus Daily let me go; Higher, higher, In the school of wisdom, More of grace to know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Deeper yet, I pray, And higher every day, And wiser, blessed Lord, In Thy precious, holy Word.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Deeper, deeper! Blessed Holy Spirit, Take me deeper still, Till my life is Wholly lost in Jesus, And His perfect will.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Deeper, deeper! Though it cost hard trials, Deeper let me go! Rooted in the Holy love of Jesus, Let me fruitful grow.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Deeper, higher, Every day in Jesus, Till all conflict past, Finds me conqueror, And in His own image Perfected at last.
